page: Microsoft Azure ND96is_MI300X_v5 is an isolated, premium storage capable virtual machine belonging to the NDISv5MI300X family. It is powered by an Intel processor with x86_64 architecture, delivering 96 dedicated vCPUs. The system is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and features a substantial memory capacity of 1850.0 GB, which translates to approximately 19.27 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration integrates eight GPUs to support parallel processing workloads. For local data storage, the instance is equipped with 31769 GB of local storage capacity. It is designed with premium storage capabilities, though it does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the high density of GPU accelerators, massive memory allocation, and extensive local storage, this instance represents a high-end hardware class. It is qualitatively positioned for resource-intensive, large-scale deployments where high-throughput parallel computing is required. The hardware profile is suited for workloads such as deep learning training, large language model inference, massive database hosting, and complex data science jobs.
description: Microsoft Azure ND96is_MI300X_v5 is an isolated virtual machine from the NDISv5MI300X family, designed for high-demand parallel computing and data-intensive workloads. Powered by an Intel x86_64 processor, the instance provides 96 dedicated vCPUs and 1850.0 GB of system memory, yielding 19.27 GB of RAM per core. The hardware configuration is heavily accelerated, featuring eight integrated GPUs alongside 31769 GB of local storage. Operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this premium storage capable server is engineered for extreme resource density. The combination of massive memory, extensive local storage, and multi-GPU capabilities makes this instance highly suitable for large-scale AI training, complex data science simulations, and enterprise database hosting.
